apiTopology.title: API topology
apiTopology.description: How should the public frontend reach /api/public/* in production?

apiBaseUrl.title: VITE_API_URL value
apiBaseUrl.description: Use blank for same-origin; otherwise enter full API origin such as https://api.pyxis.xyz

deploymentTarget.title: Deployment target / host
deploymentTarget.description: Where will the built site run? Example: Go backend static embed, nginx, Netlify, Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, S3/CloudFront, unknown

bookingSpamMitigation.title: Booking form spam mitigation for launch

stagingUrl.title: Staging / release-candidate URL
stagingUrl.description: Leave blank if it does not exist yet

contentApprover.title: Final public content approver
contentApprover.description: Who signs off on copy, dates, prices, age restrictions, address, and contact info?

targetLaunchDate.title: Target launch date or urgency
targetLaunchDate.description: Example: ASAP, this week, before first event, YYYY-MM-DD, unknown

acceptedLaunchRisks.title: Known risks you are willing to accept for v1
acceptedLaunchRisks.description: Example: generic social previews OK; no CMS; no mobile visual diff; empty archive OK
